hero.subtitle: Interior Design & Architecture Studio
hero.description: By blending refined aesthetics with thoughtful functionality, we craft environments that feel personal, timeless, and connected to their context.

about.label: About Us
about.title: We Believe The Most Beautiful Spaces
about.titleHighlight: Speak to Those Who Live in Them
about.paragraph1: At Mercer Studios, we believe the most beautiful spaces are those that speak to the people who live in them — not just spaces that look good, but those that feel right.
about.paragraph2: Our design philosophy blends harmony, proportion, and intentional storytelling in every project. We don't create spaces that are merely showpieces — we create sanctuaries that invite comfort, conversation, and living.
about.paragraph3: Every project is deeply rooted in context, crafted with attention to detail, and shaped by our clients' lifestyles and aspirations.
about.quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.

collaborative.title: Collaborative + Client-Driven
collaborative.description: We begin by understanding your vision, lifestyle and needs, ensuring your space reflects who you are.

holistic.title: Holistic Design
holistic.description: Our work integrates architecture, interior design, materials, lighting, and spatial flow.

timeless.title: Timeless Craftsmanship
timeless.description: We value balanced proportions, refined material choices, and tactile finishes that stand the test of time.

personal.title: Personal & Functional
personal.description: Every corner of your space is deliberately designed to be both meaningful and practical.

services.label: Services
services.title: What We Offer
services.description: Comprehensive design solutions tailored to transform your vision into reality.

projectsSection.label: Portfolio
projectsSection.title: Selected Projects
projectsSection.description: Explore a curated selection of projects that reflect our signature blend of refined elegance and thoughtful living.

sereneSanctuary.title: Serene Sanctuary
sereneSanctuary.description: A tranquil bedroom retreat with natural light and organic textures.
sereneSanctuary.fullDescription: This Tashkent residence transforms the master suite into a peaceful sanctuary. We carefully curated natural materials—linen, oak, and stone—to create a space that breathes tranquility. The design emphasizes the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces, with floor-to-ceiling windows flooding the room with soft, natural light throughout the day.

modernHeritage.title: Modern Heritage
modernHeritage.description: Contemporary kitchen blending marble elegance with warm wood tones.
modernHeritage.fullDescription: In the heart of Tashkent, we crafted a kitchen that honors the building's heritage while embracing contemporary living. Calacatta marble surfaces meet warm walnut cabinetry, creating a dialogue between old and new. Every detail, from the custom bronze hardware to the integrated lighting, was designed to elevate daily rituals.

artisanLiving.title: Artisan Living
artisanLiving.description: A curated living space celebrating art and sculptural furniture.
artisanLiving.fullDescription: This Tashkent apartment celebrates the art of living well. We designed the space as a gallery for the client's collection, with bespoke furniture pieces that serve as functional sculptures. The neutral palette allows the artwork to take center stage while maintaining warmth and intimacy.

spaRetreat.title: Spa Retreat
spaRetreat.description: A spa-inspired bathroom with natural stone and serene atmosphere.
spaRetreat.fullDescription: Inspired by Swiss alpine wellness traditions, this bathroom becomes a daily spa experience. Natural travertine, heated floors, and integrated steam features create a space for restoration. The minimalist design focuses on sensory experiences—the texture of stone, the warmth of water, the quality of light.

grandAtrium.title: Atrium Retail Stall
grandAtrium.description: A modern and compact retail stall designed for a shopping mall.
grandAtrium.fullDescription: This project is a retail stall designed for placement inside a shopping mall. The concept focuses on an open and eye-catching layout that naturally attracts passing visitors. Integrated lighting and contemporary materials highlight the displayed products, while the compact design ensures efficient use of the limited space.

executiveStudy.title: Executive Study
executiveStudy.description: A sophisticated home office with custom millwork and warm ambiance.
executiveStudy.fullDescription: For an executive, we designed a home office that balances professionalism with personal comfort. Floor-to-ceiling walnut millwork houses an extensive library while concealing modern technology. The space respects the building's Art Deco heritage while serving contemporary work patterns.

intimateGathering.title: Intimate Gathering
intimateGathering.description: A minimalist dining space designed for meaningful conversations.
intimateGathering.fullDescription: This Tashkent dining room embodies Nordic design philosophy—every element serves a purpose, and beauty emerges from simplicity. The custom oak table seats ten comfortably, while pendant lighting creates an intimate atmosphere. The space seamlessly connects to the kitchen, facilitating the Danish tradition of hygge.

honey.title: Honey
honey.description: A warm and inviting space with natural textures and soft lighting.
honey.fullDescription: This Tashkent residence features a cozy living area designed to feel like a warm embrace. Natural wood tones, soft textiles, and warm lighting create an atmosphere of comfort and tranquility. The design draws inspiration from the warmth of honey, bringing a sense of home and serenity to the space.

kidsRoom.title: Kids Room
kidsRoom.description: A playful and functional children's bedroom with natural materials.
kidsRoom.fullDescription: This Tashkent kids' room combines playfulness with functionality. Natural wood elements, soft textures, and vibrant colors create a space that is both inviting and practical. The design encourages creativity while maintaining a sense of calm and comfort.

hallway.title: Hallway
hallway.description: A serene and welcoming hallway with natural materials and soft lighting.
hallway.fullDescription: This Tashkent hallway is designed to be a welcoming transition space. Natural wood tones, soft lighting, and carefully selected textures create an atmosphere of calm and comfort. The design emphasizes the importance of creating a positive first impression in any residential space.

benefits.personalized: Personalized design solutions tailored to your lifestyle
benefits.proportion: Attention to proportion, balance and spatial harmony
benefits.craft: Deep commitment to craft, quality, and detail
benefits.timeless: Projects that feel timeless rather than trend-driven
benefits.seamless: Seamless integration of architecture and interiors
